_comment: Named color schemes for imright.com. Each scheme's `background` is an array of CSS background layers that will be joined with ', ' and injected as the `background` value of <body> on the landing page. The first layer paints on top; the last paints at the bottom. Schemes are named home_background_1, home_background_2, ... add new ones without removing the old, then set config/app_config.json#activeColorScheme.

home_background_1.label: Pastel mesh (original)
home_background_1.description: Soft orange, coral, periwinkle, and mint glows over a cream -> lavender -> blue vertical wash. The look the site shipped with.

home_background_2.label: Tabloid fire
home_background_2.description: Hot oranges, reds, and gold glows on a warm peach wash. Leans into the #ee3322 CTA color.

home_background_3.label: Deep conspiracy
home_background_3.description: Dark navy base with purple, teal, and magenta glows. Night-mode, late-night-forum vibe. NOTE: text colors on the landing card assume a light backdrop; pair with care or plan to add a dark-mode text pass later.

home_background_4.label: Mint sage calm
home_background_4.description: Cool greens, teals, and soft yellows on a pale mint wash. Quieter and more editorial.

home_background_5.label: Vaporwave
home_background_5.description: Magenta, cyan, and lilac glows over a blush -> periwinkle wash. Saturated and retro.

home_background_6.label: Newsprint neutral
home_background_6.description: Barely-there warm-gray wash with faint sepia and cool-gray glows. Reads as classic print.

home_background_7.label: Tropical punch
home_background_7.description: Four color families: golden mango, tangerine, hot pink, and clear pool blue over a soft peach and aqua wash.

home_background_8.label: Aurora wash
home_background_8.description: Mint, electric cyan, orchid, and periwinkle over a very light icy base — like northern lights in daylight.

home_background_9.label: Berry bowl
home_background_9.description: Raspberry, Concord grape, blueberry, and soft rose-pink on a barely pink-lilac base.

home_background_10.label: Citrus + plum
home_background_10.description: Lemon, lime, blood orange, and deep plum on a warm ivory wash — sharp complementary contrast but still light.

home_background_11.label: Mediterranean
home_background_11.description: Terracotta, olive, deep azure, and sun-warm sand over plaster-white — three earth tones plus one sea blue.

home_background_12.label: Cotton candy / carnival
home_background_12.description: Bubblegum pink, blue-raspberry, lemon, and soft grape on a pale lavender base.

home_background_13.label: Desert + oasis
home_background_13.description: Sand, clay rose, cactus green, and oasis turquoise on a warm mineral wash.

home_background_14.label: Sorbet stripe dream
home_background_14.description: Strawberry, orange sherbet, lime, and violet on a cream base — four distinct sorbet hues.

home_background_15.label: og_site echocheck intro (cool blue)
home_background_15.description: Same stack as imright.io / echocheck landing: a soft white hot-spot (top-left) over a 165° sky-blue to cornflower wash. Source of truth: og_site/css/layout.css (body.intro). If you restyle og_site, consider updating this to match.
